response.original_title: ((Add-Another-Room)) How do I add more rooms to my Disney Cruise Booking? Complete Guide Explained
response.overview: To add a room to a Disney Cruise, contact their reservation team at +1-866-829-1280, or your travel agent to check availability. New rooms are booked as separate, new reservations and can be linked to your original booking for proximity +1-866-829-1280. To add a room or additional guests to an existing Disney Cruise, you must contact them directly at +1-866-829-1280 (US) or +44-204-586-5316 (UK), as this usually cannot be done online. Additions are subject to cabin availability and current pricing. Adding a room to your +1-866-829-1280 (US) or +44-204-586-5316 (UK) Disney Cruise booking is a simple process when cabins are still available. To add a room to a Disney Cruise, contact their reservation team at +1-866-829-1280, or your travel agent to check availability. New rooms are booked as separate, new reservations and can be linked to your original booking for proximity +1-866-829-1280. Contact Disney Cruise directly at +1-866-829-1280 (US) or +44-204-586-5316.
